name: Red and Green Tomato Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups red and green tomatoes, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a deep 9-inch pie pan with the pastry; crimp edges and brush with evaporated milk.
2. Bake in a very hot oven (450°F) for 5 minutes.
3. Fill shell with tomatoes and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Mix remaining ingredients and spread on tomatoes.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 40 minutes, or until tomatoes are done.
